entities.name: SmartBuffer
entities.context: A factory constructor used for creating buffers

entities.name: writeXXX()
entities.context: A method that has been modified to overwrite data instead of inserting

entities.name: insertXXX()
entities.context: A new method introduced for inserting data at a specific offset

relationships.context: insertXXX() replaces the old behavior of writeXXX() when an offset is provided
